title: helianthemum guerrae
intro: Helianthemum guerrae, also known as Guerras rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to the Canary Islands. This plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum guerrae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Helianthemum guerrae can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
